name: devpanl
description: Wire any project into the DevPanel autonomous agent team. Generates .agents SOULs calibrated to the codebase, configures MCP, and exposes /devpanl:init, /devpanl:doctor, /devpanl:dispatch, /devpanl:update-widget, /devpanl:add-storybook, /devpanl:install-glitchtip-sdk, /devpanl:wire-glitchtip.
